Event: The Runic Adventure
Event Date: 08/07/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: A234
Shadow Cutter artifact

Triggers: 6 sec

Fatal Damage
The artifact owner tears through the armor of all enemy units and applies exhaustion to them every second for 3 sec.
When their armor is torn, the enemy units take 200000 pure damage, and their physical armor is reduced by 30% for 3 sec. These units also take 300000 physical damage for 3 sec.
Exhausted enemy unit takes physical damage equal to 125% of the artifact owner's attack every second. While the effect is active, their damage and attack speed are reduced by 35%. The exhaustion lasts 3 sec. Stacks up to 1 times.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
